title: Symbiosis Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Symbiosis Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital:
Symbiosis Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital!
